rent.note: furnished 1BR in Kentron district; $700–$1,100 range for central

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; $70–$150 depending on season

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; EVN Coworking and others available

simData.note: Armenian SIM; VivaCell-MTS or Beeline; cheap data

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Yerevan peaks Apr–Oct tourist season.

evidence.quote: In central Yerevan (Kentron district), a 1-bedroom apartment ranges from $700–1,100 per month, with modern or newly renovated apartments at the higher end
Utilities: Estimated at $70–150 per month, depending on season. Groceries: $200–350 monthly if cooking regularly

evidence.claim: overall digital nomad cost ~$1,487–$1,826/mo depending on lifestyle
evidence.quote: A single person's overall cost of living is approximately $1,487 per month. For digital nomads specifically, the cost of living is $1,826 per month

evidence.claim: Yerevan 71% cheaper than NYC; budget living from $827/mo incl. rent
evidence.quote: Yerevan is notably affordable for digital nomads, with the city being 71% cheaper than New York City. Baseline monthly expenses range from $827.00 for a single person, including rent
